exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: Was 72.5x8,8,8 @RPE7 - all reps clean at low RPE, +2.5kg. Hinge, neutral spine, control the eccentric.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: Was 6,6,5,5 @RPE9 - hold bodyweight, aim 6 across. Full dead hang to chin over.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Was 25x10,10,10 @RPE9 - hold, squeeze shoulder blades, no torso swing.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Was 30x12,12,12 @RPE8 - +2.5kg. If 1.25kg plates unavailable, stay at 30. 3 sets only, preacher finisher covers the 4th.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Was 40x15,15,15 @RPE9 - hold. Rear delts + posture. Pull to forehead, elbows high.

exercises.name: Box Situp
exercises.notes: First time this slot (swapped in for Cable Crunch). Lower back over the box for extended range - CONTROLLED, no ballistic hyperextension. Watch the lower back.

exercises.name: Machine Preacher Curl (drop set)
exercises.notes: ONE triple-drop set, no rest between drops. Start 30kg to failure (hit 11 last time) -> drop ~25kg to failure -> drop ~20kg to failure. Bicep finisher.
